discovery_knowledge_base.title: EVA Data Model Layer Registration Protocol
discovery_knowledge_base.description: When adding new layers to the EVA Data Model, three files must be updated in sync: (1) model/{layer_name}.json data file with layer_name as root key, (2) api/routers/admin.py _LAYER_FILES dict mapping layer_name to filename, (3) model/layer-metadata-index.json layers array. Additionally, server.py ontology_domains should include the new domain, and test_agent_guide.py layer count assertion must be updated.
